title: T-050 — allergen_changeover_validations FK + lab_results ATP extension (08-PROD consumer)
prompt:
# T-050 — allergen_changeover_validations consumer FK + lab_results ATP extension

PRD: §6.3 lab_results ALTER (09-QA extension), §10.3 consumer of allergen_changeover_gate_v1 (08-PROD owner), §11.6 V-QA-ALLERGEN-001/002, §16.3 cross-PRD impact
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Link 09-QA writes to allergen_changeover_validations.first_signed_by/second_signed_by (08-PROD owns table, 09-QA writes per §16.3) and apply the §6.3 lab_results ALTER to extend for ATP + allergen test_type pass_threshold.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration 0143 emits ALTER TABLE lab_results per §6.3 verbatim adding columns: inspection_id UUID REFERENCES quality_inspections(id), allergen_changeover_validation_id UUID REFERENCES allergen_changeover_validations(id), external_lims_id TEXT, threshold_min NUMERIC, threshold_max NUMERIC, pass_threshold NUMERIC, pass_flag BOOLEAN.
2. Verify allergen_changeover_validations table exists (owned by 08-PROD); if 08-PROD migration is not yet applied, this task creates a stub FK guard (CHECK constraint deferred) and documents the dependency.
3. 09-QA Server Action namespace apps/web/src/server/quality/allergenGates/signActions.ts owns first_signed_by + second_signed_by write paths (Server Actions implemented in T-055).
4. Drizzle schema entries: packages/db/src/schema/labResults.ts updated; packages/db/src/schema/allergenChangeoverValidations.ts (read-only, 08-PROD owner).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0143_lab_results_atp_extension.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/labResults.ts [modify]
- packages/db/src/schema/allergenChangeoverValidations.ts [create or modify if exists]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/lab-results-atp-extension.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0143 applied, when \d lab_results runs, then the 7 new columns exist (inspection_id FK, allergen_changeover_validation_id FK, external_lims_id, threshold_min, threshold_max, pass_threshold, pass_flag)
2. Given a lab_results row with test_type='atp_swab', pass_threshold=10, measured_value=7, when pass_flag computation/trigger runs, then pass_flag=true; with measured_value=12 pass_flag=false (server-side compute; trigger or app-layer per §6.3 hint)
3. Given allergen_changeover_validations table not yet present (08-PROD pending), when migration 0143 runs, then it logs a deferred-FK note and stays applied with a NOTICE; if 08-PROD is applied, then the FK constraint is fully validated

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: lab-results-atp-extension.test.ts asserting column introspection + pass_flag compute + deferred-FK note before migration
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test lab-results-atp-extension'

## Risk red lines
- 09-QA writes only to first_signed_by/second_signed_by per §16.3 (08-PROD owns the table; do not modify other columns)
- Do not create allergen_changeover_validations table here (08-PROD owner) — schema entry is read-only
- Do not skip pass_threshold/pass_flag columns (ATP changeover handoff requirement per §6.3)
- Do not deviate from §6.3 ALTER column list verbatim

pipeline_inputs.description: Apply §6.3 lab_results ALTER for ATP/allergen extensions + read-only Drizzle schema for allergen_changeover_validations (08-PROD owner). 09-QA writes signed_by columns via T-055.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0143 ALTER lab_results adding 7 columns verbatim per §6.3 (inspection_id, allergen_changeover_validation_id, external_lims_id, threshold_min, threshold_max, pass_threshold, pass_flag). pass_flag computation strategy: prefer DB trigger over CHECK to allow NULL when pass_threshold IS NULL; if measured_value <= pass_threshold (low-is-good for ATP RLU) then pass_flag=true. Read-only Drizzle schema entry for allergen_changeover_validations (08-PROD owner per §10.3 + §16.3); 09-QA writes only first_signed_by/second_signed_by/first_signature_hash/second_signature_hash columns via T-055 Server Actions. PRD anchors verified: §6.3 lab_results ALTER block (lines 506-516); §10.3 consumer of allergen_changeover_gate_v1; §11.6 V-QA-ALLERGEN-001/002; §16.3 cross-PRD impact (line 1835) names 09-QA writes to first_signed_by/second_signed_by.
out_of_scope: Do not create allergen_changeover_validations table (08-PROD owner)
Do not implement sign Server Actions here (T-055)
Do not implement ATP device integration (P2, §12.3)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0143 applied, when \d lab_results runs, then the 7 new columns from §6.3 ALTER exist (inspection_id FK, allergen_changeover_validation_id FK, external_lims_id, threshold_min, threshold_max, pass_threshold, pass_flag)
Given a lab_results row with test_type='atp_swab' pass_threshold=10 measured_value=7, when the pass_flag computation/trigger runs, then pass_flag=true; with measured_value=12 then pass_flag=false

Given allergen_changeover_validations table not yet present (08-PROD migration deferred), when migration 0143 runs, then it logs a deferred-FK NOTICE and stays applied; if 08-PROD is present, the FK is fully validated
test_strategy: RED: lab-results-atp-extension.test.ts asserting column introspection + pass_flag compute + deferred-FK behavior before migration
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test lab-results-atp-extension'
risk_red_lines: 09-QA writes ONLY to first_signed_by/second_signed_by/*_signature_hash per §16.3 — do not modify other 08-PROD columns
Do not create allergen_changeover_validations table here (08-PROD owner)
Do not skip pass_threshold/pass_flag columns (ATP changeover handoff per §6.3)
Do not deviate from §6.3 ALTER column list verbatim
